subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of God, do not imagine that my silence and quietude are a sign of forgetfulness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده قدیم الهی گمان منما که سکوت وخواموشی من دلیل فراموشی است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
